# Jamie Curle

> Designing, developing and deploying web stuff since 1998. Drummer since
> 1993. Woodsman and arborist since 2022. Educator since 2012. Natural born leader.
> Pro AI.

## About

Jamie Curle is a well rounded human being living and operating in
Northumberland, UK. He spends his time between software, his workshop and
restoring ancient woodland. He doesn't like it when you bring up the topic
of "nearly finished" DIY projects.

Jamie has over two decades of experience building and scaling web systems.
He has been the first engineer at a startup, scaling technology from zero to
$20M+ revenue, and has a track record of direct, positive impact on the
careers and lives of reports and students through servant-based leadership.

Jamie runs jamiecurle ltd, a freelance consultancy currently delivering a
cloud-first, AI-native Elixir-based system integration connecting GraphQL
ecommerce with multiple legacy SFTP fulfilment workflows.

Beyond the keyboard, Jamie is a drummer of 30+ years and is restoring and
managing an eight-acre ancient semi-natural woodland back to oak standards
with hazel coppice.

Jamie is the kind of person you hire when you need a load of things doing,
they all seem impossibly complex and you need someone who can "get it done".

## Skills

- Software engineering: Elixir, Phoenix, Python
- System design and architecture
- Engineering leadership and team management
- Information security and privacy engineering
- AI-harnessed engineering

## Open To

Jamie is open to fully remote full-time opportunities in Elixir, Phoenix, engineering
leadership, and AI-harnessed engineering.

## Links

- Blog: https://jamiecurle.com

## Location / Timezone

Northumberland, UK. UTC.
